title: NutritionContent
description: The nutrition content of the item.

servingSizeInGrams.description: The serving size in grams. This field and the servingSizeInMilliliters field are mutually exclusive.

servingSizeInMilliliters.description: The serving size in milliliters. This field and the servingSizeInGrams are mutually exclusive.

fats.description: The fats in grams per serving size.

saturatedFats.description: The saturated fats in grams per serving size.

monoUnsaturatedFats.description: The mono unsaturated fats in grams per serving size.

polyUnsaturatedFats.description: The poly unsaturated fats in grams per serving size.

carbohydrates.description: The carbohydrates in grams per serving size.

sugar.description: The sugar in grams per serving size.

polyols.description: The polyols in grams per serving size.

starch.description: The starch in grams per serving size.

protein.description: The protein in grams per serving size.

salt.description: The salt in grams per serving size.

sodium.description: The sodium in grams per serving size.

fibres.description: The fibres in grams per serving size.

vitaminC.description: The vitamin C in milligrams per serving size.

calcium.description: The calcium in milligrams per serving size.

magnesium.description: The magnesium in milligrams per serving size.

chloride.description: The chloride in milligrams per serving size.

fluoride.description: The fluoride in milligrams per serving size.

potassium.description: The potassium in milligrams per serving size.

caffeine.description: The caffeine in milligrams per serving size.

energy.description: The energy in kcal per serving size.
